concerns.text: FR-007 requires sensitivity analysis on RMSE threshold over {4.5, 5.0, 5.5} kcal/mol. T034a states 'a range of values' but does not explicitly specify the required thresholds {4.5, 5.0, 5.5} kcal/mol from FR-007.

SC-003 requires RMSE threshold and correlation >0.8 validation 'across solvent classes'. T034b validates RMSE <5 kcal/mol and correlation >0.8 but does not explicitly state per-solvent-class validation (only T036a does for correlation).

Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy) requires Reference-Validator Agent enforcement for citations. Plan.md Constitution Check claims Principle II passes, but no task in tasks.md implements or invokes this agent to validate citations or enforce title-token-overlap threshold.
Plan.md Project Structure lists data-model.md as a Phase 1 output defining entity-to-file mapping for Constitution Principle IV compliance. No task exists to create this required artifact.
Plan.md Project Structure lists quickstart.md as a Phase 1 output. T043 validates quickstart.md but no task exists to CREATE quickstart.md, creating a dependency gap.

Multiple tasks reference 'Reviewer Concerns (Pauling/Curie/Franklin)' that do not appear in the current spec.md or plan.md. These are stale tags from previous review cycles and should be removed or updated to reference actual spec requirements.
T037b documents breakdown threshold 'within 3 Å of ion' that appears nowhere in spec.md or reviewer comments, introducing an unsupported quantitative claim not traceable to the spec.
